prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (hybrid) with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing for the **AM08 6.0L V12 (Code: AM28)** to achieve 650whp on 93 octane with a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system, replacing the factory Bosch ME9.7.1 ECU. Includes a **Pectel SQ6M** data logger for real-time monitoring of AFR, boost, and ignition timing.

Install a **Titan Motorsport billet aluminum dry-sump oil system** with a 10-quart capacity and dual-scavenge pumps to prevent oil starvation under sustained 1.2G lateral loads. Pair with a **Setrab 10-row oil cooler (Series 1)** and **Mocal thermostatic oil bypass valve** to maintain oil temps below 220°F during track use.

Replace the factory **ZF 6HP26 6-speed automatic transmission** with a **Graziano GT3000 6-speed manual conversion kit** (Aston Martin V12 Vantage-spec), featuring a **Tilton 7.25" twin-disc carbon clutch** with **AP Racing CP7580 hydraulic release bearing** and **PPG 1st-4th gear synchros** for seamless shifts. Includes a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** with 45% lockup for optimal power delivery.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS DB9 widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm rear fender flares, 30mm front) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl overwrap** and **RWB-style exposed rivets** for aggressive stance. Pair with **TE37VOLK Racing CE28SL wheels** (9.5x19 ET30 front, 11.5x19 ET40 rear) in **Gunmetal Bronze** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (265/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear).

Install a **Vorsteiner V-Stream carbon fiber front splitter** (DB9-specific, 3-piece) with **hidden aluminum support rods** and **Aston Martin Racing-style dive planes**. Add a **Rear Diffuser from Prior Design (PD900)** in raw carbon fiber with **integrated titanium exhaust tips (Akrapovic Ti-Evo)** for a motorsport-inspired rear end.

Replace the factory interior with a **full Alcantara retrim by Royal Steering Wheels**, including **custom DB9 door cards with carbon fiber inserts**, **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, and a **Momo Prototipo 350mm steering wheel** with **quick-release hub (NRG Innovations)**. Add a **Motec C127 dash display** in place of the factory cluster for real-time telemetry.
